stories.headline: Taylor Swift Rhode Island Home: Lights On at Estate as Fireworks Go Off - TMZ
stories.summary: Taylor Swift's Rhode Island house had its lights on as fireworks lit up the sky on the 4th of July.

stories.headline: Taylor Swift Wedding Details: Adam Sandler, Blank Space Handkerchiefs - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: Jason Kelce's daughters reportedly served as flower girls, with Swift's aunt, Robin Gentry, sharing to the media as she left the event, "They cried, and they laughed, and they danced, and they hugged…

stories.headline: Box Office: ‘Minions & Monsters’ Scares Up $16 Million on Friday - Variety
stories.summary: 'Minions & Monsters' is taking over the box office for Independence Day weekend.
